title: PUT /keys/{iid} 4.09 vs spec 2.04 Add/Update contract
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c:390-405,1047-1051. spec/11-lci.md §17.5.5 titles PUT 'Add/Update Key' with response 2.04. Code rejects pubkey change on an existing IID with 4.09 Conflict (TOFU pinning; delete-then-add required). Defensible under the TOFU trust model and arguably safer, but it deviates from the written PUT contract. Fix: document the 4.09 case in the spec, or allow admin-forced update.
